# Test Design: Epic 2 — Services Management & System Health

**Date:** 2026-06-22
**Author:** Nico (auto-generated by bmad-story-lifecycle orchestrator)
**Status:** Approved
**Scope:** Epic 2 — WireMock engine layer, Services CRUD API, Services UI, real-time SignalR status, System Events screen, Notification Panel, and Cache Management settings.

---

## Executive Summary

**Scope:** Epic-level test design for Epic 2 (v0.2.0 — Services Management)

**Epic definition of done:** A user can import or create services with volume-mounted WireMock mappings, have the mock engine serve requests end-to-end, and see infrastructure events when things go wrong — without waiting for Epic 4.

**Risk Summary:**

- Total risks identified: 9
- High-priority risks (score ≥6): 4
- Critical categories: TECH (engine isolation), SEC (SignalR auth), PERF (card grid load), DATA (seed import idempotency)

**Coverage Summary:**

- P0 scenarios: 14 (~22–30 hours)
- P1 scenarios: 18 (~20–28 hours)
- P2/P3 scenarios: 11 (~8–14 hours)
- **Total effort estimate:** ~50–72 hours (~6–9 working days)

---

## Not in Scope

| Item | Reasoning | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| **Mapping/Response file CRUD** | Epic 4 scope | Covered in Epic 4 test design |
| **Activity log display** | Epic 3 scope | Covered in Epic 3 test design |
| **Record mode** | Epic 4 scope | Not exposed in Epic 2 |
| **Admin Console user management** | Epic 5+ scope | Deferred |
| **WCAG 2.1 AA full audit** | Pre-ship gate PSG-2 — scheduled after Epic 4 | Tracked in releases.yaml as pre_ship_gate |
| **k6 load testing** | No concurrent user load requirement until v1 launch | Planned for Epic 5 NFR milestone |

---

## Risk Assessment

### High-Priority Risks (Score ≥6)

| Risk ID | Category | Description | Probability | Impact | Score | Mitigation | Owner | Timeline |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-001 | TECH | WireMock.NET engine fault in one service cascades and affects management API or other services (NFR-5) | 2 | 3 | 6 | Integration test that injects startup failure on Service A and asserts GET /health + Service B still respond correctly; per-service try/catch + fault isolation boundary | Dev+QA | Story 2.1 |
| R-002 | SEC | SignalR hub connections (ServicesHub, EventsHub) accept unauthenticated WebSocket upgrades | 2 | 3 | 6 | Integration test: connect to `/hubs/services` without JWT cookie → assert connection refused (401); connect with valid JWT → assert accepted | Dev+QA | Story 2.3 |
| R-003 | DATA | Seed file import creates duplicate services or silently corrupts existing ones on container restart | 2 | 3 | 6 | Integration test: run seed import twice with same file; assert idempotent outcome (no duplicate slugs, only new services created); assert System Event written for skipped entries | Dev+QA | Story 2.1 |
| R-004 | PERF | Services page with 50 cards takes >1 second to render (NFR from PRD §5.1) | 2 | 3 | 6 | E2E Playwright test: seed 50 services, navigate to /services, assert DOMContentLoaded + last card visible within 1000ms; monitor React Query cache hit on re-navigation | Dev+QA | Story 2.2 |

### Medium-Priority Risks (Score 3–4)

| Risk ID | Category | Description | Probability | Impact | Score | Mitigation | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-005 | TECH | Port collision between two services in the 30100–30199 range not detected correctly | 2 | 2 | 4 | Integration test: create two services with the same port; assert second returns 400 SERVICE_PORT_CONFLICT and System Event written | Dev+QA |
| R-006 | DATA | Slug uniqueness constraint not enforced at DB level (only app code) | 1 | 3 | 3 | Integration test: insert duplicate slug directly via EF; assert unique index constraint throws; API test: POST with duplicate slug → 400 | Dev+QA |
| R-007 | BUS | Enable/disable toggle reverts optimistically but UI does not show error toast on failure | 2 | 2 | 4 | Component test (Vitest + MSW): mock POST /start returning 500; assert toggle reverts to original position and error toast appears | Dev+QA |

### Low-Priority Risks (Score 1–2)

| Risk ID | Category | Description | Probability | Impact | Score | Action |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-008 | OPS | Seed file mounted read-write accidentally allows Fishtank to write back to it | 1 | 2 | 2 | Integration test: verify no write operations attempted on seed file path; NFR-13 compliance | Monitor |
| R-009 | BUS | Notification panel badge displays incorrect count when dismiss and mark-as-read race | 1 | 1 | 1 | Unit test for badge count reducer; E2E smoke for panel interactions | Monitor |

### Risk Category Legend

- **TECH**: Technical/Architecture
- **SEC**: Security (auth, access controls)
- **PERF**: Performance / SLA violations
- **DATA**: Data integrity (corruption, idempotency)
- **BUS**: Business impact (UX errors, logic bugs)
- **OPS**: Operations / compliance

---

## NFR Planning

| NFR Category | Requirement / Threshold | Risk Link | Planned Validation | Evidence Needed |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Performance | 50 service cards render within 1 second of navigation (PRD §5.1) | R-004 | E2E Playwright: seed 50 services, time navigation to /services; assert cards visible ≤1000ms | Playwright timing report |
| Security | SignalR hubs reject unauthenticated connections (NFR-8) | R-002 | Integration test: unauthenticated WebSocket upgrade → 401 | xUnit integration test pass |
| Security | Seed file never written by Fishtank container (NFR-13) | R-008 | Integration test: verify no file-write calls on seed path | xUnit test + code review |
| Reliability | Engine fault in Service A does not affect Service B or /health (NFR-5) | R-001 | Integration test: inject startup failure on Service A; assert Service B and /health still respond | xUnit integration test pass |
| Reliability | WireMock port binding failure creates System Event (not silent failure) | R-005 | Integration test: cause port collision; assert SystemEvent row written with severity=error | xUnit integration test pass |
| Maintainability | Services table uses DataTable base component (reusable for Epic 3+4) | — | Code review: DataTable component exists in src/client/src/components/ui/; Story 2.2 implements it | Code review checklist |

**Unknown thresholds:** Cache entry count "estimated size" display (FR-46) — no byte threshold defined; implementation to use best-effort estimate.

---

## Entry Criteria

- [x] Epic 2 stories defined with acceptance criteria in `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md`
- [x] Test framework scaffold complete (Playwright + xUnit — framework-setup-progress.md step-05 done)
- [x] Epic 1 done: JWT auth, AppShell, SPA shell all available for test fixtures
- [x] Architecture decisions finalised in `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md`
- [ ] Story file created for target story before ATDD scaffolds are written

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] All P0 tests passing (100% pass rate)
- [ ] All P1 tests passing (≥95% pass rate; failures triaged)
- [ ] R-001 fault isolation test GREEN (NFR-5)
- [ ] R-002 SignalR auth test GREEN (NFR-8)
- [ ] No open HIGH severity bugs unresolved
- [ ] Traceability matrix covers all ACs for each story in Epic 2
- [ ] `nfr-assess` verdict: no BLOCKER items for performance, security, reliability categories

---

## Test Coverage Plan

### Story 2.1 — WireMock Engine Layer & Services API Backend

#### P0 (Critical) — Run on every commit

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Risk Link | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST /api/services creates service, WireMock starts on assigned port, row persisted with all fields | API (xUnit Integration) | R-001 | Verify WireMock port responds to HTTP after creation |
| Port binding failure → Service status=Stopped, SystemEvent severity=error written | API (xUnit Integration) | R-001, R-005 | Use port already bound by test fixture |
| POST /api/services with duplicate slug → HTTP 400 SERVICE_SLUG_CONFLICT | API (xUnit Integration) | R-006 | |
| POST /api/services with invalid ExternalUrl (no http/https prefix) → HTTP 400 | API (xUnit Integration) | — | |
| Seed file import: new services created, duplicates by slug skipped, SystemEvent written for skipped | API (xUnit Integration) | R-003 | Run import twice; assert idempotent |
| Engine fault isolation: inject startup failure on Service A; assert GET /health=200 and Service B port responsive | API (xUnit Integration) | R-001 | Core NFR-5 test |

**Total P0 for Story 2.1:** 6 integration tests, ~10–14 hours

#### P1 (High) — Run on PR

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Risk Link | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET /api/services returns all non-deleted services with runtime status | API (xUnit Integration) | — | Soft-delete filter: DeletedAt IS NULL |
| PUT /api/services/{id} with slug-changing name → response includes MocksRoot changed flag | API (xUnit Integration) | — | |
| POST /api/services/{id}/stop → WireMock listener halted; POST /{id}/start → listener restarts | API (xUnit Integration) | — | |
| GET /api/services/next-port → returns lowest unassigned port in 30100–30199 | API (xUnit Integration) | — | |
| Port outside 30100–30199 → HTTP 400 SERVICE_PORT_OUT_OF_RANGE | API (xUnit Integration) | R-005 | |
| Slug uniqueness enforced at DB level (unique index — not app-code only) | Unit (EF migration test) | R-006 | |

**Total P1 for Story 2.1:** 6 tests, ~8–10 hours

#### P2/P3 (Secondary)

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Seed file absent → info SystemEvent written, startup proceeds | API (xUnit Integration) | NFR startup graceful handling |
| Name > 64 chars → 400 | API (xUnit Integration) | Edge case |
| Port already assigned to another service (logical conflict, not OS) → 400 | API (xUnit Integration) | |

---

### Story 2.2 — Services Page: Browse, Create & Edit Services

#### P0 (Critical) — Run on every commit

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Risk Link | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| /services loads with 50 seeded services; all cards visible within 1000ms | E2E (Playwright) | R-004 | Performance gate |
| Empty state shows "Add Service" CTA when no services exist | E2E (Playwright) | — | |
| Add Service modal: port field pre-filled via GET /api/services/next-port | E2E (Playwright) | — | |

**Total P0 for Story 2.2:** 3 E2E tests, ~4–6 hours

#### P1 (High) — Run on PR

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Card grid: 3 col at ≥1024px, 2 col at 640–1023px, 1 col at <640px | E2E (Playwright) | Responsive breakpoints |
| Stopped services render at 72% opacity | Component (Vitest + RTL) | |
| Table view toggle switches layout; preference persisted for session | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Add Service form: inline validation on blur for name (blank, >64 chars, emoji) | Component (Vitest + RTL) | |
| Slug-change warning appears inline when name change alters slug (Edit modal) | Component (Vitest + RTL) | |
| Tags: enter free-form tags, save, assert tags appear on card and filter works | E2E (Playwright) | FR-2 |

**Total P1 for Story 2.2:** 6 tests, ~6–8 hours

---

### Story 2.3 — Enable/Disable Toggle, ServicesHub & Real-Time Status

#### P0 (Critical) — Run on every commit

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Risk Link | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Toggle click: optimistic UI update (toggle state changes immediately before server response) | Component (Vitest + RTL + MSW) | — | Mock POST /stop with delay |
| Server failure: toggle reverts to original position; error toast shown | Component (Vitest + RTL + MSW) | R-007 | Mock POST /stop returning 500 |
| /hubs/services: unauthenticated WebSocket upgrade rejected (401) | Integration (xUnit) | R-002 | |

**Total P0 for Story 2.3:** 3 tests, ~3–5 hours

#### P1 (High) — Run on PR

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| ServiceStatusChanged event broadcast → queryClient.invalidateQueries([["services"]]) triggered | E2E (Playwright, multi-tab or MSW SignalR mock) | HUB_INVALIDATION_MAP wiring |
| EventsHub skeleton: authenticated connection accepted, no events broadcast | Integration (xUnit) | |
| /hubs/events: unauthenticated connection rejected | Integration (xUnit) | R-002 |

**Total P1 for Story 2.3:** 3 tests, ~4–6 hours

---

### Story 2.4 — System Events Screen & Notification Panel

#### P0 (Critical) — Run on every commit

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| /events page lists all System Events descending by CreatedAt | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Notification bell badge increments in real time when warning/error SystemEvent created | E2E (Playwright, SignalR or MSW mock) | FR-23 real-time badge |

**Total P0 for Story 2.4:** 2 E2E tests, ~3–4 hours

#### P1 (High) — Run on PR

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Panel shows only warnings+errors (not info); initial load = 20 items; "Load more" loads next 20 | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Click on item body → item marked read; badge decrements | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Dismiss (✕) → item removed from panel view; SystemEvent remains in DB | E2E (Playwright) | |
| "Mark all read" → all server-side unread events marked read; badge = 0 | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Badge displays "99+" when unread count > 99 | Component (Vitest + RTL) | |
| Navigation event → panel closes | E2E (Playwright) | |

**Total P1 for Story 2.4:** 6 tests, ~6–8 hours

---

### Story 2.5 — Settings: Service Cache Management

#### P0 (Critical) — Run on every commit

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Settings → Cache lists all services with cache entry count and estimated size | E2E (Playwright) | |
| Per-service "Clear" with confirmation → cache cleared; reloads on next request | E2E (Playwright) | Confirmation dialog required (NFR-15) |

**Total P0 for Story 2.5:** 2 E2E tests, ~2–3 hours

#### P1 (High) — Run on PR

| Test Scenario | Test Level | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| "Clear All" with confirmation → all service caches cleared | E2E (Playwright) | |
| No services configured → empty state message shown | Component (Vitest + RTL) | |
| Standard User (non-Admin) can access and use Cache management | E2E (Playwright) | FR-46 — not Admin-only |

**Total P1 for Story 2.5:** 3 tests, ~2–4 hours

## Execution Strategy

| Suite | Trigger | Estimated Duration |
|---|---|---|
| **PR gate** (all P0 + P1) | Every push to `story/**` or `release/**` | ~15–25 minutes |
| **Nightly** (P2/P3 + performance) | Scheduled nightly on `release/**` | ~10–15 minutes |

## Resource Estimates

| Priority | Test Count | Estimated Hours |
|---|---|---|
| P0 (16 tests) | ~22–30 hours | |
| P1 (24 tests) | ~26–36 hours | |

---

## Quality Gates

| Gate | Threshold |
|---|---|
| P0 pass rate | 100% — no exceptions |
| P1 pass rate | ≥95% — failures must be triaged and accepted |
| R-001 engine isolation test | MUST be GREEN before any Epic 2 story is done |
| R-002 SignalR auth test | MUST be GREEN before Story 2.3 is done |
| Coverage target | ≥80% line coverage on new Epic 2 backend code paths |
| NFR validation evidence | Performance, Security, Reliability categories must have at least one evidence artifact in nfr-assess |
